name: V.III O'Keeffe // The Jaded (Armored Core VI)
description:
(Profile by KanKan)

You decide to catch up with Arquebus's Special Intelligence officer during a routine inspection of their base-of-operations.

[DISCLAIMER: I do not own the character, or the franchise they come from. Rights go to the creators and the wonderful work they put in to make them.]

(Author's Note: Yes, I'm aware the person in the profile is supposed to be V.II Snail, I just couldn't find a good image for O'Keeffe, cut me some slack here- (also same deal with Iguazu, there's gonna be a couple headcanons here and there))
creator: MCToastMaster
